sections.about_desc: Welcome to FlowerLab Vlada – the first studio in Chernivtsi that introduced giant bouquets and large signature compositions! We continuously grow, learn, and improve our craft. We expand our team, introduce new shapes, colors, and arrangements, explore global trends, and adapt them for our clients. Our studio also collaborates with various brands and venues, creating floral solutions for events, gifts, and visual decor. FlowerLab Vlada is quality, style, and service that inspire and leave a lasting impression.

reviews_data.name: Oksana M.

intro.title: We are FlowerLab Vlada, a floral studio.
intro.desc: Our team creates premium bouquets and signature floral arrangements focused on quality, style, and emotion. With daily deliveries of fresh flowers, a wide selection, and attentive service, we've become a studio people trust in Chernivtsi.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.p1: Welcome to our flower shop — a place where every bouquet tells a story. We believe that flowers are more than just a gift; they are a way to express emotions, share happiness, and make every moment memorable.
about.p2: Our team carefully selects fresh flowers every day to ensure the highest quality and beauty in every arrangement. Whether it’s a romantic gesture, a celebration, or just a small token of appreciation, we create bouquets that speak from the heart.
about.p3: We take pride in our attention to detail, creative designs, and friendly service. Each bouquet is handcrafted with love, tailored to fit your style and occasion.

seo.home_desc: Premium bouquets, fresh flowers, and gifts with delivery in Chernivtsi. Order online for best quality and service.

about_page.title: ABOUT US
about_page.history: We are FlowerLab Vlada, a floral design studio. Our team creates premium bouquets and signature floral arrangements with a focus on quality, style, and emotion. Daily deliveries of fresh flowers, a wide selection, and caring service make us the studio people trust in Chernivtsi. We are the first in Ukraine to introduce the format of giant bouquets and large signature box compositions. This has become part of our unique style and brand identity. We continuously grow, learn, and improve our work. We expand our team, introduce new shapes, colors, and arrangements, explore global trends, and adapt them for our clients. Our studio also collaborates with various brands and venues, creating floral solutions for events, gifts, and visual decor. FlowerLab Vlada is quality, style, and service that inspire and leave a lasting impression.

cookies.banner_text: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site. You can learn more in our

privacy_policy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy_policy.intro: At FlowerLab Vlada, we take the protection of your personal data seriously. Since we are in the business of delivering emotions in the form of flowers, it's important to us that you feel safe leaving your data on our website.

sections.title: 1. What information do we collect?
sections.content: To place an order, we need: your name, phone number, and email. Also, to carry out delivery in Chernivtsi and the region, we collect recipient data: name, address, and contact phone number.

sections.title: 2. How do we use your data?
sections.content: We use your data exclusively for: processing and delivering orders, contacting you (including via Viber/WhatsApp/Telegram to clarify details), and providing access to your personal account.

sections.title: 3. Payments and Security
sections.content: Payment for orders is carried out through the secure payment gateway LiqPay. FlowerLab Vlada does not collect or store your bank card data. The entire transaction takes place on the side of the payment infrastructure according to global security standards. For your authorization on the site, we use protected HttpOnly Cookies.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies so that your cart does not disappear when you close the page and so that you remain authorized in your account. You can manage your consent to the use of cookies through our banner.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights and Data Deletion
sections.content: You have full control over your data. You can change your information in your personal account or completely delete your account along with the entire history through the 'Settings' section. We do not transfer your data to third parties, except for cases necessary for order delivery (courier service).

delivery_info.title: Delivery & Payment
delivery_info.seo_desc: Delivery and payment conditions for flowers in the FlowerLab online store in Chernivtsi.
delivery_info.payment_p1: Payment is made online via payment systems (Visa / MasterCard / Apple Pay / Google Pay / <1>LiqPay</1>).
delivery_info.payment_p2: Refunds are only possible in case of order cancellation before the composition is assembled.
delivery_info.delivery_p1: Delivery is carried out within Chernivtsi and suburbs daily from 9:00 to 22:00.
delivery_info.delivery_p2: Orders placed after 21:00 are fulfilled the next day.
delivery_info.delivery_p3: The delivery cost is standard regardless of the neighborhood.
delivery_info.delivery_p4: Pickup from the Flower Lab Vlada studio is also available by prior arrangement.
delivery_info.delivery_p5: If the recipient is not at the address, the courier will contact them by phone. If there is no connection, the order may be left on-site or returned to the studio.

refund_policy.title: Refunds and Exchanges (Refund Policy)
refund_policy.seo_desc: Conditions for returning and exchanging flowers and products in the FlowerLab online store.
refund_policy.general_p1: Flowers are perishable goods, so their return is possible only in exceptional cases.
refund_policy.general_p2: Returns are possible only in case of:
refund_policy.general_l2: Damage to the product during delivery.
refund_policy.general_l3: Inadequate quality at the time of receipt of the order by the client.
refund_policy.claims_l1: The buyer is obliged to report a claim within <1>two hours</1> after receiving the order. The claim must be accompanied by mandatory photo fixation.
refund_policy.claims_l2: Consideration of the claim is carried out by the administrator within <1>24 hours</1> from the moment of the buyer's appeal.
refund_policy.refund_p1: If the application for the return of the product is approved due to its inadequate quality or damage during delivery, we will issue a refund to the same user's bank card from which the payment was made.
refund_policy.refund_p2: Also, a full refund is possible in case of order cancellation on the buyer's initiative, but strictly <1>before the florist starts assembling the composition</1>.
refund_policy.refund_p3: The term for crediting funds depends on the card-issuing bank.

public_offer_page.title: Business rules for the Flower Lab Vlada online store (Public offer)
public_offer_page.seo_desc: Business rules and public contract of the Flower Lab Vlada online store.
public_offer_page.s1_1: 1.1. The Flower Lab Vlada online store is an online platform for selling flowers, compositions, gift sets, and related products.
public_offer_page.s1_2: 1.2. Users can browse the catalog, place orders, pay online, and order delivery or pickup.
public_offer_page.s1_3: 1.3. Registration on the site is not mandatory, however, to make repeat purchases or participate in the loyalty program, creating a personal account is recommended.
public_offer_page.s1_4: 1.4. Placing an order constitutes the buyer's consent to these rules and the privacy policy.
public_offer_page.s2_1: 2.1. The buyer can be any individual who has reached the age of 18.
public_offer_page.s2_2: 2.2. Persons aged 14 to 18 can make online purchases only within the limits of small household orders that correspond to their income, or with the consent of parents / legal representatives.
public_offer_page.s2_3: 2.3. The site administration is not responsible for the accuracy of the data entered by the user when placing an order.
public_offer_page.s3_1: 3.1. An order can be placed through: the Flower Lab Vlada website, social networks (Instagram, Facebook), messengers (Viber, Telegram, Direct).
public_offer_page.s3_2: 3.2. An order is considered accepted after confirmation by the administrator.
public_offer_page.s3_3: 3.3. Mandatory data is required for registration: name, contact phone number, delivery address (if necessary).
public_offer_page.s4_1: 4.1. Payment is made online via payment systems (Visa / MasterCard / LiqPay / Apple Pay / Google Pay).
public_offer_page.s4_2: 4.2. Refunds are possible only in case of order cancellation before the composition is assembled.
public_offer_page.s5_1: 5.1. Delivery is carried out within Chernivtsi and the suburbs daily from 9:00 to 22:00.
public_offer_page.s5_2: 5.2. Orders placed after 21:00 are completed the next day.
public_offer_page.s5_3: 5.3. The delivery cost is standard regardless of the district.
public_offer_page.s5_4: 5.4. Pickup from the Flower Lab Vlada studio is also available with prior time agreement.
public_offer_page.s5_5: 5.5. If the recipient is absent at the address, the courier will contact by phone. If there is no connection, the order may be left on site or returned to the studio.
public_offer_page.s6_1: 6.1. Photos of goods on the website are indicative. Slight differences are possible due to seasonality or flower shades.
public_offer_page.s6_2: 6.2. If a certain type of flower is absent, the florist has the right to replace it with a similar one in color and cost, after agreeing it with the client.
public_offer_page.s6_3: 6.3. Individual orders (designer bouquets, corporate orders, event decor) are accepted upon prior agreement of the conditions and terms of execution.
public_offer_page.s7_1: 7.1. Flowers are perishable goods, so their return is possible only in case of: non-compliance with the order, damage during delivery, inadequate quality at the time of receipt.
public_offer_page.s7_2: 7.2. The buyer must report a claim within two hours after receiving the order (with photo fixation).
public_offer_page.s7_3: 7.3. Consideration of the claim is carried out within 24 hours from the moment of application.
public_offer_page.s8_1: 8.1. Users' personal data are used exclusively for processing and delivering orders.
public_offer_page.s8_2: 8.2. A user can request the deletion of their data by sending a request to the official email address of Flower Lab Vlada.
public_offer_page.s9_1: 9.1. Upon registering on the site, the user receives a 10% discount on their first order.
public_offer_page.s9_2: 9.2. Promotions and special offers are valid during the specified period mentioned on the site or in social networks.
public_offer_page.s9_3: 9.3. Regular customers can receive personalized offers or bonuses.
